title: × lomateria gloriosa
intro: × Lomateria gloriosa, also known as the "Kutki" plant, is a type of Indian herb belonging to the Gentianaceae family. It is widely used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various digestive issues, fever, and liver problems. The health benefits of × Lomateria gloriosa include its ability to enhance digestion, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for liver and kidney issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including powder, capsules, and decoctions, which are often used to treat conditions such as jaundice, malaria, and liver cirrhosis.
